buildCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "preview" ]; then npx convex deploy --preview-create="${GITHUB_HEAD_REF:-$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF}" --preview-run seed:preview --cmd-url-env-var-name NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL --cmd 'npm run build'; else npx convex deploy --cmd-url-env-var-name NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL --cmd 'npm run build'; fi
